behavior: Confirmed database, notification, documentation, manifest, mock-graph, dead-API, and review-sensor findings are corrected without reopening a broad cleanup stream.
revision_scope: Verified working tree based on the recorded revision.
changes: Moved connection-scoped SQLite settings into pool connection options and added a multi-connection regression test.
Applied saved notification preferences to real dashboard alerts, limited alerts to new or rescored jobs, and kept notification content count-only.
Added a maintained local Markdown link checker and repaired all six known broken links.
Replaced copied webhook validation implementations in security documentation with concise references to the shared security owner.
Removed four unused member dependency declarations and centralized development mock type ownership.
Deleted unowned definition-only Rust APIs and their dead support code, including speculative credential-expiry surfaces.
Regenerated SQLx offline metadata after deleting obsolete queries and updated the current backend command count.
Kept repository-wide file-size hard caps while scoping advisory review output to changed files.
Removed the disposable source-tree metadata artifact and all generated verification outputs.

commands.relevant_result: The complete local gate passed with 828 script tests, 2,924 frontend tests across 246 files, production and component-library builds, 10 runtime smoke journeys within budget, SQLx metadata verification, strict linting, and the complete Rust workspace.
commands.caveat: The environment doctor reported that host Node and npm versions differ from repository-owned baselines; all checks passed.

commands.relevant_result: The repository artifact and bloat audit passed after the source-tree artifact and generated outputs were removed.
commands.caveat: Generated build and test directories are recreated by their owning commands.

commands.relevant_result: Harness, Markdown, local-link, and prose checks passed for maintained documentation.
commands.caveat: Repeated after final state and evidence updates.

commands.relevant_result: Exact dependency pins, lockfile policy, and workspace dependency declarations passed.
Repository-wide hard caps passed and advisory output was reduced from 407 repository files to 18 changed files.
commands.caveat: The advisory list is informational and does not replace the repository-wide hard-cap scan.

commands.relevant_result: The verified working diff contains no whitespace errors.
commands.caveat: Repeated after final state and evidence updates.
